summary: Tested Comparative Answer mode (Pillar 19) — both backend APIs and frontend UI. Fixed a critical syntax error in comparative_service.py (missing def line for _build_cross_citation_note) and missing frontend .env file (REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL falling back to localhost causing CORS errors). All 5 backend tests pass, all 11 frontend feature tests pass.

critical.issue: SyntaxError in comparative_service.py line 174-176: `def _build_cross_citation_note(` function definition was missing, causing unmatched ')' syntax error. Both GET /compare/jurisdictions and POST /compare/analyze returned 500.

ui_bugs.issue: Missing /app/frontend/.env file — REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL defaulted to localhost:8001, causing CORS errors in browser. All API calls from browser failed.

critical_code_review_comments: comparative_service.py line 174: `def _build_cross_citation_note(` was missing — function body existed but def statement was absent, causing module-level syntax error and 500 on all compare endpoints. FIXED.
Frontend .env was missing — should be committed or generated in deployment pipeline. FIXED.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Comparative feature (Pillar 19) fully tested and working. Fixed syntax bug in comparative_service.py and created frontend .env. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_comparative.py. The compare/analyze endpoint takes ~35-60s for 3 jurisdictions (LLM calls). Graph has 248 nodes, 9 edges. 239 docs in vector store.
rca_of_issues: 1) comparative_service.py: The `_build_cross_citation_note` function definition header (def line + parameters) was accidentally omitted, leaving orphaned parameter annotations at module level which Python parsed as unmatched ')'. Fix: added `def _build_cross_citation_note(` before the parameter list. 2) frontend/.env: File was missing entirely, causing REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL to fall back to localhost:8001 which is blocked by browser CORS. Fix: created .env with external preview URL.
